name: "V that"
description: This is a very general construction abstracting over a range of more specific uses. In this construction, a person or entity (the Agent) is put in relation with a particular event or situation (a Fact), expressed as a clause optionally introduced by 'that'. The nature of this relation depends on the verb that is used in the construction: communication, cognition, emotion, and several others.
meaning: An Agent relates to a Fact in a way specified by the verb.
